name: WebSocket + JSON-RPC 2.0 framing
description: Implement WebSocket server for device communication using JSON-RPC 2.0 protocol.
acceptance_criteria: Supports method dispatch to registered handlers
Connection is authenticated via JWT (token in query param or header)
Connections are tracked per dongle_id (one active connection per device)
Unit tests cover connection lifecycle, JSON-RPC framing, and auth
go build and go vet pass cleanly
